notes: Authoritative Crown Audio product page returned 403; specs confirmed via BSW USA, Wave Electronics, Thomann, and KPODJ retailer pages. Audio inputs are XLR-only (no XLR/TRS combo). Power inlet is IEC C20 (20A) — the device-side inlet is C20; this is mapped to iec-c19 as the closest enum value since iec-c19 represents the high-current IEC 60320 20A inlet family (C19 is the plug, C20 is the inlet, they are the same connector pairing). Binding posts are standard banana/binding-post type. USB is Type B for PC control software, not audio streaming. Loop-through (Link/Out) connector type inferred as XLR3 female based on Thomann listing 'Link Out XLR'.

ports.name: Link/Out Ch 1
ports.note: Loop-through signal from Ch 1 input for linking another amplifier

ports.name: Link/Out Ch 2
ports.note: Loop-through signal from Ch 2 input for linking another amplifier

ports.name: Output Ch 1
ports.note: Neutrik Speakon NL4MP; Ch 1 Speakon also carries Ch 2 signal on pins 2+/2- for single 4-conductor cable use

ports.name: Output Ch 1
ports.note: Binding post output, in parallel with Speakon Ch 1

ports.name: Output Ch 2
ports.note: Binding post output, in parallel with Speakon Ch 2

ports.name: HiQnet USB
ports.note: USB Type B for HiQnet Band Manager and System Architect control software

ports.name: AC In
ports.note: IEC C20 inlet (20A); device-side connector is C20 inlet, mating cable connector is C19. Locking power cord clip included.
